title: Ali Baba and the Forty Thieves
original_title: Ali Baba et les Quarante Voleurs
overview: A lord’s servant, Ali Baba, is sent to retrieve a slave for his master, but ends up on an adventure filled with gold, mischief, love, and forty famous thieves instead.
